title: Chewy Uruguayan Rice Bowl
description: A simple yet flavorful Uruguayan-inspired dish made with chewy rice, savory beef, and a hint of spices. Serve as a comforting dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Add the chewy rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cover the skillet with a lid.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
